title: Affixes Unlocked
subtitle: The Full Framework — Everything Clicks Here

wrong_answer_tracking.behaviour: Wrong answers go to back of current session queue.
wrong_answer_tracking.wrong_count_usage: Feed to Gemini system prompt for AI Practice.

alam_mo_ba: Tagalog has been estimated to have over 1,000 distinct affixes and affix combinations. But the core ones — mag-, nag-, um-, i-, pa-, -in, -an, ma-, naka-, napa-, pag- — unlock the vast majority of everyday speech. You've been seeing them since Lesson 6. Now you know why they work.
completion_reward.alam_mo_ba_display: Show 1 random fun fact on lesson completion screen.

progress_ring.display: Ring animates from X/5 to (X+1)/5 on session completion
